title: AsaThorr's PvP Resource pack
description: My WIP PvP resource pack, with short swords, better crystals and totems, visual knockback on swords, and more!
body:
# A PvP resource pack with many features, by me, for my friends.

### Main features:

- Black and red theme
- Smooth textures
- QoL features, such as no fishing bobber, low fire and shield, and transparent inventory
- 32x tools, 64x swords
- Visual knockback and potion types (L4J-like)
- Custom sky

### Planned updates:

- More environment blocks transformed to a smoother version

### Add-ons :

- 16x swords - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/asathorrs-pack-16xswords

## THERE IS NO CIT RESEWN FOLDER, IT WILL NOT WORK IN 1.21.4 AND BELOW!

Also, to get custom skies to work, you need the "Skyboxify" mod (https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify) or Optifine.
